Class Event

java.lang.Object
model.Event
public class Event extends Object
Represents an event in the university events app.

An event is created by an EntertainmentProvider and may have one or more Performance instances. Events can be ticketed (requiring booking and payment) or non-ticketed (free entry).

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event(long eventID, String title, EventType type, boolean isTicketed, EntertainmentProvider organiser)
      Constructs a new Event.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique event identifier
      title - the event title; must not be null or blank
      type - the type of event; must not be null
      isTicketed - whether the event requires tickets
      organiser - the EP organising this event; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getEventID

      public long getEventID()

    • getEventTitle

      public String getEventTitle()

    • setEventTitle

      public void setEventTitle(String title)

    • getType

      public EventType getType()

    • setType

      public void setType(EventType type)

    • getIsTicketed

      public boolean getIsTicketed()

    • setIsTicketed

      public void setIsTicketed(boolean isTicketed)

    • getOrganiser

      public EntertainmentProvider getOrganiser()

    • createPerformance

      public Performance createPerformance(long performanceID, LocalDateTime startDateTime, LocalDateTime endDateTime, Collection<String> performerNames, String venueAddress, int venueCapacity, boolean venueIsOutdoors, boolean venueAllowsSmoking, int numTickets, double ticketPrice)
      Creates a new Performance, adds it to this event, and returns it.
      Parameters:
      performanceID - the unique performance ID
      startDateTime - start date/time
      endDateTime - end date/time
      performerNames - names of the performers
      venueAddress - the venue address
      venueCapacity - the venue capacity
      venueIsOutdoors - whether the venue is outdoors
      venueAllowsSmoking - whether the venue allows smoking
      numTickets - total tickets available
      ticketPrice - price per ticket in GBP
      Returns:
      the newly created Performance

    • getPerformanceByID

      public Performance getPerformanceByID(long performanceID)

    • getInfoOfPerformancesOnDate

      public Collection<String> getInfoOfPerformancesOnDate(LocalDateTime searchDateTime)
      Returns information about performances that start on the given date.
      Parameters:
      searchDateTime - the date/time to match (performances starting on the same date)
      Returns:
      a collection of performance info strings

    • getOrganiserName

      public String getOrganiserName()

    • getOrganiserEmail

      public String getOrganiserEmail()

    • hasPerformanceAtSameTimes

      public boolean hasPerformanceAtSameTimes(LocalDateTime startDateTime, LocalDateTime endDateTime)
      Checks whether this event already has a performance whose time range overlaps with the given range.
      Parameters:
      startDateTime - the start of the range to check
      endDateTime - the end of the range to check
      Returns:
      true if an overlapping performance exists

    • getPerformances

      public List<Performance> getPerformances()
      Returns an unmodifiable view of the performances for this event.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of performances

      public void addPerformance(Performance performance)

      Returns a string representation of this event.
